EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} is stopping virtual machine "{object.name}" on ESXi host {datafield6} belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} is resuming virtual machine "{object.name}" on ESXi host {datafield6} belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
Virtual machine "{object.name}" is being suspended on ESXi host {datafield6} belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
Virtual machine "{object.name}" is reset on ESXi host {datafield6} belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
Virtual machine "{object.name}" is suspended on ESXi host {datafield6} belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
Unable to power on virtual machine "{object.name}" on ESXi host {datafield6} belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
Unable to reset virtual machine "{object.name}" on ESXi host {datafield6} belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
Virtual machine "{object.name}" is powered on on ESXi host {datafield6} belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
Unable to power off virtual machine "{object.name}" on ESXi host {datafield6} belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
The user {subject.account.name} is starting virtual machine "{object.name}" on ESXi host {datafield6} belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
Unable to suspend virtual machine "{object.name}" on ESXi host {datafield6} belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
Virtual machine "{object.name}" is powered off on ESXi host {datafield6} belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
